sections.label: What is RTIH?
sections.text: What is RTIH?Ratan Tata Innovation Hub is Andhra Pradesh's flagship initiative to transform the state into a global startup hub. Operating on a Hub-and-Spoke model, RTIH at Amaravati acts as the central hub, supported by five regional centers across Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, Rajahmundry, Tirupati, and Anantapur. Ratan Tata Innovation Hub Designed toNurture innovation and entrepreneurship across the stateConnect startups with markets, research, and government initiativesDrive cutting-edge innovation in AI, biotech, clean energy, advanced manufacturing, and emerging technologiesPromote inclusivity by supporting women, rural innovators, and underrepresented groups

sections.label: 20,000Start-Ups to be created1 lakhJobs to be created by 202920+Enable 20+ Soonicorns10+Enable 10+ Unicorns10Centers of Excellence in emerging technologies
sections.text: 20,000Start-Ups to be created1 lakhJobs to be created by 202920+Enable 20+ Soonicorns10+Enable 10+ Unicorns10Centers of Excellence in emerging technologies

sections.label: What makes RTIH unique?
sections.text: What makes RTIH unique?Andhra Pradesh's innovation ecosystem stands out through strategic design, inclusive policies, and technology-driven execution.Hub & Spoke ModelCentralized coordination with district-level execution for maximum reach and impact.Inclusivity & DiversityEmpowering women, rural entrepreneurs, and underrepresented communities.Digital IntegrationSeamless Startup One portal for simplified processes and reduced bureaucracy.VisakhapatnamRajamahendravaramVijayawadaTirupatiAnanthapuramuAmaravati HubSectoral FocusTargeted support across agriculture, healthcare, fintech, and emerging technologies.Academia-Industry CollaborationStrong partnerships between educational institutions and industry leaders.Policy TargetsClear roadmap with measurable goals for startup ecosystem development.

sections.label: What makes RTIH unique?
sections.text: What makes RTIH unique?Andhra Pradesh's innovation ecosystem stands out through strategic design, inclusive policies, and technology-driven execution.

sections.label: Focus Segments
sections.text: Focus Segments Comprehensive support ecosystem designed to nurture innovation at every stage of your entrepreneurial journey. StartupsMSME’sRural EntrepreneurshipInnovators1Startup AccelerationStructured programs to refine business models and fast-track growth.2Mentorship & StrategyAccess to seasoned entrepreneurs, domain experts and business coaches.3Seed Funding & Investor ConnectSupport in raising capital through grants, angel networks, and VCs.4Co-working & InfrastructureAffordable workspace, labs, and shared resources for product development.5Legal & IP AssistanceHelp with company incorporation, IP filing, and regulatory compliance.6Go-to-Market SupportGuidance on market entry, customer acquisition, and pilot deployments.7Pitch Platforms & Demo DaysOpportunities to present to investors, corporates, and ecosystem enablers.8Networking & PartnershipsConnect with industry, academia, and government for strategic growth.chevron_leftchevron_right

sections.label: Partner With Us
sections.text: Partner With UsTailored support for different entrepreneur categories, ensuring inclusive growth across Andhra Pradesh's innovation ecosystem. Join Now MentorsMentors are the guiding force behind every successful startup. At RTIH, we invite experienced professionals, industry experts, and thought leaders to share their knowledge and insights with budding entrepreneurs.Why Partner as a Mentor?✔Shape the next generation of innovators.✔Share your expertise and create real impact.✔Network with a vibrant community of startups and industry leaders.InvestorsFuel innovation by investing in high-potential startups. RTIH connects investors with curated, promising ventures across diverse sectors.Why Partner as an Investor?✔Access to a pipeline of innovative startups.✔Opportunities for strategic investments and collaborations.✔Be part of a growing entrepreneurial ecosystem.CorporatesCorporates are key drivers of innovation through collaboration and market access. Partner with RTIH to co-create solutions, explore new technologies, and engage with startups that align with your business goals.Why Partner as a Corporate?✔Discover cutting-edge solutions for your business challenges.✔Build strategic

sections.label: Corporates
sections.text: CorporatesCorporates are key drivers of innovation through collaboration and market access. Partner with RTIH to co-create solutions, explore new technologies, and engage with startups that align with your business goals.Why Partner as a Corporate?✔Discover cutting-edge solutions for your business challenges.✔Build strategic alliances with startups and innovators.✔Strengthen your brand as an innovation leader.

sections.label: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.text: Frequently Asked QuestionsEverything you need to know about Ratan Tata Innovation Hub in Andhra Pradesh1. What is Ratan Tata Innovation Hub (RTIH)?−RTIH is a state-wide initiative set up by the Government of Andhra Pradesh to promote innovation, entrepreneurship, and industry–academia collaboration. It acts as a central point of support for startups and innovators.2. What is the vision behind establishing the Ratan Tata Innovation Hub (RTIH)?+The RTIH was established to nurture grassroots innovation, empower entrepreneurs, and create a vibrant startup ecosystem in Andhra Pradesh, with a vision to enable “One Family One Entrepreneur” and honor Ratan Tata’s legacy of innovation and social responsibility.3. Where is RTIH located?+The central hub is set up at Amaravati, with Spokes in Vijayawada, Visakhapatnam, Tirupati, Anantapuram, and Rajamahendravaram, collectively extending innovation support to all corners of the state.4. Who can apply for RTIH support?+Startups, entrepreneurs, MSMEs, students, grassroots innovators, women, differently abled and minority entrepreneurs, corporate partners, and academic institutions are eligible to apply for support under the Ratan Tata Innovation

sections.label: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.text: Frequently Asked QuestionsEverything you need to know about Ratan Tata Innovation Hub in Andhra Pradesh

sections.label: RTIH-Outposts
sections.text: RTIH-OutpostsRTIH-Outposts are institutional partners within the RTIH statewide innovation network—enabling universities, colleges, and regional centres to deliver startup support locally, with shared access to mentors, investors, programs, and platforms aligned to the AP Innovation & Startup Policy 2024–29.Why Partner as an RTIH-Outpost?✔Become part of Andhra Pradesh’s policy-aligned innovation ecosystem.✔Extend high-quality startup support to your region with statewide backing.✔Access shared mentors, investors, programs, and digital platforms.✔Build your incubation capacity and credibility✔Help local startups contribute to jobs and regional growth.
